changes.content: Register for "The Festival of AI and AI for Business" networking event. It's first come, first serve, and places are limited. Event details: Tuesday 3rd March, 12-1.30 pm, The Atrium, Main Campus NCI.
changes.title: Register for AI Festival Event

changes.content: Research the following companies attending "The Festival of AI and AI for Business" networking event: BearingPoint Ireland, ETH Dublin 2026, Skillwell, CeADAR | Ireland's Centre for AI, BNY | Global Financial Services - APAC Region, PFH Technology Group. Focus on their AI initiatives, recruitment, and technologies.
changes.title: Research AI Festival Companies

changes.content: Prepare questions for employers at "The Festival of AI and AI for Business" networking event. Topics to cover: recruitment, technologies used, how AI is driving their business, tips on how to stand out as a fresher/graduate.
changes.title: Prepare Questions for AI Festival

changes.content: Attend "The Festival of AI and AI for Business" round table networking event with employers. Date: Tuesday 3rd March, Time: 12-1.30 pm, Location: The Atrium, Main Campus NCI.
changes.title: Attend AI Festival Networking Event
